# polaris_view_grant (Resource)

Grants a view-level privilege to a Polaris catalog role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "polaris_catalog_role" "reader" {
  catalog = "prod"
  name    = "reader"
}

resource "polaris_view_grant" "example" {
  catalog      = polaris_catalog_role.reader.catalog
  catalog_role = polaris_catalog_role.reader.name
  namespace    = ["sales"]
  view_name    = "monthly_summary"
  privilege    = "VIEW_READ_PROPERTIES"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `catalog` (String) The name of the catalog. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `catalog_role` (String) The name of the catalog role receiving the grant. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `namespace` (List of String) Namespace path as an ordered list of components. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `privilege` (String) The view-level privilege to grant (e.g. VIEW_READ_PROPERTIES, VIEW_FULL_METADATA). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `view_name` (String) The name of the view. Changing this forces a new resource.
